title: selaginella barnebyana
intro: Selaginella barnebyana, also known as Barneby's spikemoss, is a species of plant in the Selaginellaceae family, specifically a type of spikemoss that belongs to the ancient group of vascular plants known as lycopods. It has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella barnebyana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
